sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) riches, substance. Pro 1:13 6:31 8:18 Psa 44:13, בְּלֹא הֹון gratis, for no price. Plur. הֹונִים Eze 27:33.

(2) adv. enough. Pro 30:15, 16 Pro 30:16. So LXX. (ἀρκεῖ), Chald., Syr., Arab. (Arab. هَوْنُ facility, comfort; compare أَانَ Med. Waw to live comfortably, quietly; أَوْنُ quiet, wealth; אֹון wealth, substance).
